candidate_problem_record.subject: Biology
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: All of the cells were synced prior to the start of the experiment. During the experiment, a fluorescent chemical was applied to cells, which would fluoresce only when bound to DNA. The results of the experiment are shown above. Differences in cell appearance by microscopy or changes in detected DNA were determined to be phases of the cell cycle and are labeled with the letters A-D.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 进行实验以评估完整细胞周期中存在的 DNA 量。在实验开始时,所有细胞均处于同步状态。实验过程中,将荧光化学物质应用于细胞,仅在与 DNA 结合时发出荧光。实验结果如图所示。通过显微镜观察或检测到的 DNA 含量变化,确定细胞外观的差异对应细胞周期的不同时期,并用字母 A-D 标记。这些细胞中 S 期大约需要多长时间?
metadata.explanation_zh: 细胞周期中的合成期(S期)是遗传物质复制的阶段。根据实验数据,只有B期表现出增加的趋势。从x轴的时间刻度来看,B期持续约30分钟。
